column8: If we will go shopping tomorrow, I'll probably buy a new top.
column9: If Mum is tired tonight, I cook dinner.
column10: John will tell us if there will be any news.
column11: If I won't get a good mark in the geography test, I'll be very annoyed!
column12: You are tired in the morning if you don't go to bed soon.
column13: If you see Karen, do you ask her to call me?
column14: Does Frank come with us if we go to the beach at the weekend.
column15: If you need help, will tell me!
